description: Body Node Slot In Children is a ProtoFlux node that checks the parent slots of Source (Slot) for a Biped Rig component, and then reads the BipedRig component for the provided Node (BodyNode). If the node's mapped slot is a child of Source (Slot) it returns that mapped slot.

fields.Source: The slot to check all of it's children infinitely far down for the provided Node (BodyNode).
fields.Node: The node to check Source (Slot)'s children for.
fields.* ([[Slot]]): The slot under the provided Source (Slot) that has an assignment to the provided Node (BodyNode).
